# Psalms 86

## Verses (17)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let your ears be open to my voice, O Lord, and give me an answer; for I am poor and in need. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Keep my soul, for I am true to you; O my God, give salvation to your servant, whose hope is in you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Have mercy on me, O Lord; for my cry goes up to you all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Make glad the soul of your servant; for it is lifted up to you, O Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | You are good, O Lord, and full of forgiveness; your mercy is great to all who make their cry to you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | O Lord, give ear to my prayer; and take note of the sound of my requests. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | In the day of my trouble I send up my cry to you; for you will give me an answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | There is no god like you, O Lord; there are no works like your works. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Let all the nations whom you have made come and give worship to you, O Lord, giving glory to your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | For you are great, and do great works of wonder; you only are God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Make your way clear to me, O Lord; I will go on my way in your faith: let my heart be glad in the fear of your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | I will give you praise, O Lord my God, with all my heart; I will give glory to your name for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | For your mercy to me is great; you have taken my soul up from the deep places of the underworld. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | O God, men of pride have come up against me, and the army of violent men would take my life; they have not put you before them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | But you, O Lord, are a God full of pity and forgiveness, slow to get angry, great in mercy and wisdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | O be turned to me and have mercy on me: give your strength to your servant, and your salvation to the son of her who is your servant. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Give me a sign for good; so that my haters may see it and be shamed; because you, Lord, have been my help and comfort. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
